# NextStep

> NextStep is an AI-powered career platform connecting ex-consultants from McKinsey, BCG, and Bain with strategic business roles. Free for both candidates and companies.

## Blog

The NextStep Blog offers expert career advice for management consultants exploring exit opportunities, career transitions, and life after consulting.

- [Top Exit Opportunities for Consultants in 2026](/consulting-exit-opportunities-2026): Complete guide to PE, tech, corporate development, and startup paths
- [From McKinsey to Tech: How to Land a PM Role](/mckinsey-to-tech-transition): Step-by-step product management transition roadmap
- [Mastering Case Interviews](/consulting-interview-case-study-tips): Insider tips and frameworks from ex-BCG interviewers
- [Breaking Into Private Equity](/private-equity-consulting-background): Recruiting timelines, LBO modeling skills, and interview prep
- [Work-Life Balance After Consulting](/work-life-balance-after-consulting): Real stories and roles with intellectual challenge and better hours
- [Salary Negotiation for Ex-Consultants](/salary-negotiation-ex-consultants): Negotiation scripts, compensation benchmarks, and equity tactics
- [Startup vs. Corporate After Consulting](/startup-vs-corporate-ex-consultant): Decision framework and self-assessment scoring tool
- [Networking Strategies for Career Changers](/networking-strategies-career-change): Alumni outreach, LinkedIn tactics, and the 5-5-5 weekly routine
- [Bain Alumni Career Paths](/bain-alumni-success-stories): Where Bain alumni go and how they got there
- [Consulting Survey 2025](/consulting-survey-2025.html): Original research from 1,000+ consultants on pay, travel, and retention across MBB, Big 4, and boutique firms

## Platform

- **For candidates:** Weekly curated role matches based on consulting background and preferences — no application needed
- **For companies:** AI-curated shortlist of vetted ex-consultants, typically within days of posting
- **AI matching:** Uses semantic understanding of business context, not keyword filtering
- **Cost:** Completely free for both sides

## About

Founded in 2025 by Ahmed E., a former top-tier management consultant, to fix the broken process of connecting consulting talent with the right strategic roles.

Contact: zero@mail.getnextstep.com
Site: https://getnextstep.com
Blog: https://blog.getnextstep.com
